items.name: redtaxi-theme
items.title: Red Taxi Theme
items.description: Dark-first Red Taxi semantic tokens, root layout, and theme helpers for the premium transport admin look.
items.author: Red Banana Studios
items.docs: This item installs the Red Taxi root layout, semantic token system, and theme helpers. If your app already has custom providers in src/app/layout.tsx, merge them carefully instead of overwriting blindly.

items.name: redtaxi-ui
items.title: Red Taxi UI
items.description: Restyled shadcn primitives and supporting utils/hooks required for the exact Red Taxi admin look.
items.author: Red Banana Studios
items.docs: This item intentionally overwrites local src/components/ui files so the exact Red Taxi visual language is preserved. Install it into a dedicated admin app or review the diff carefully in an existing project.

items.name: redtaxi-admin-shell
items.title: Red Taxi Admin Shell
items.description: Reusable shell, page chrome, and shared admin wrappers for Red Taxi-style transport dashboards.
items.author: Red Banana Studios
items.docs: This item installs the reusable Red Taxi shell and wrapper layer. Add real routes by extending src/lib/navigation.ts and placing pages under src/app/(dashboard)/.

items.name: redtaxi-filter-toolbar-presets
items.title: Red Taxi Filter Toolbar Presets
items.description: Reusable Red Taxi filter and bulk-action rows for API-driven admin pages.
items.author: Red Banana Studios
items.docs: Install this item when you want search, status, date-range, or bulk-action toolbars that already match the Red Taxi panel language.

items.name: redtaxi-resource-list-page
items.title: Red Taxi Resource List Page
items.description: API-ready Red Taxi collection page pattern with stats, filters, table, and right-rail operational context.
items.author: Red Banana Studios
items.docs: Use this as the starting point for vehicles, drivers, bookings, customers, or any other resource collection backed by an API. Replace the mock rows, keep the shell and page rhythm.

items.name: redtaxi-resource-detail-page
items.title: Red Taxi Resource Detail Page
items.description: API-ready Red Taxi single-record layout with tabs, summary rail, alerts, and related history.
items.author: Red Banana Studios
items.docs: Use this block for vehicle, driver, booking, or infrastructure detail screens. Keep the right-rail summary and tabs, then map your API fields into the existing layout.

items.name: redtaxi-kpi-overview-page
items.title: Red Taxi KPI Overview Page
items.description: API-ready Red Taxi management reporting surface with KPI cards, chart placeholder, incidents, and route performance.
items.author: Red Banana Studios
items.docs: Use this block for weekly or monthly management boards, route performance, corridor summaries, or any KPI-first operations page.

items.name: redtaxi-row-detail-table
items.title: Red Taxi Row Detail Table
items.description: Expandable row-detail grid pattern for list screens that need inline context below each record.
items.author: Red Banana Studios
items.docs: Use this block for bookings, fleet, or dispatch queues where each row needs extra context, readiness checks, or quick actions without forcing a route change.

items.name: redtaxi-resource-form-page
items.title: Red Taxi Resource Form Page
items.description: API-ready Red Taxi create/edit layout with dense form sections, operational toggles, and a release checklist rail.
items.author: Red Banana Studios
items.docs: Use this block for vehicle, driver, booking, or infrastructure create/edit flows. Replace the mock values with your API schema, then keep the same left-form and right-validation composition.

items.name: redtaxi-dashboard-starter
items.title: Red Taxi Dashboard Starter
items.description: A basic Red Taxi dashboard implementation with stats, activity, table, and driver status panels.
items.author: Red Banana Studios
items.docs: This starter installs a root redirect from / to /dashboard and the demo dashboard page at src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx. Replace the mock data in src/lib/mock-dashboard.ts with your API data once your backend contracts are ready.

items.name: redtaxi-style-guide
items.title: Red Taxi Style Guide
items.description: The visual QA page used to verify the Red Taxi dashboard system in dark and light mode.
items.author: Red Banana Studios
items.docs: Use this page as the visual source of truth. If a new page does not look native beside / and /style-guide, it has drifted from the Red Taxi system.
